description: Prepare a non-authorizing retrieval/mirroring request for the Data-Continuation/core-lite management package. This task records the required package contract and does not fetch external artifacts by itself.
stop_condition: Retrieval request report and receipt written; no source artifact is fetched and no repository state is bound.
notes: Use this task to generate the exact retrieval/mirroring request for the 001 package. A separate authorized mechanism must supply artifacts under incoming/data_continuation_core_lite/.
